## whoami
jsmith
## server
https://api.ocpprod.acme-corp.com:6443
## client/server version
Client Version: 4.16.8
Server Version: 4.16.4
Kubernetes Version: v1.29.8
## can-i get nodes
yes
## can-i list clusteroperators
yes
## can-i create clusterrolebindings (MUST be 'no' for a proper read-only audit account)
no
## can-i get secrets -A (informational; this script never reads secret data)
no
